name: LLM Detection as an Intervention: Downstream Impact under Strategic User Behavior
summary: arXiv:2607.19300v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As LLM adoption becomes more widespread, there is a growing interest in detecting LLM-generated content, for example through LLM detection tools and...
description: arXiv:2607.19300v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As LLM adoption becomes more widespread, there is a growing interest in detecting LLM-generated content, for example through LLM detection tools and through heuristics based on language patterns. Detectors operate as an intervention that steers not only the detected attribute itself, but also downstream metrics such as LLM usage and output quality...
author: Meena Jagadeesan, Tatsunori Hashimoto, Jon Kleinberg
